description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A protocol amendment mandates that all Vital Signs data must undergo 100% Double Data Entry (DDE). Within the Phase II Diabetes Trial study, upload the Vital Signs CRF template from /home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls and configure the 'Baseline Assessment' event to require Double Data Entry. Complete both the initial and verification data entry passes for subject DM-101 using the values Systolic BP: 120 and Diastolic BP: 80. Use the 'root', 'dep1', and 'dep2' accounts (password: 'Admin123!') to ensure the record reaches 'Data Entry Complete' status.
